rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The engine binary in node_modules is compiled; source files for src/cli.ts, src/pipeline/, src/stages/ don't exist yet — always verify src/ exists before diving into node_modules.","scope":"pipeline/stages"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"An empty changeset (no files created) means the feature was never implemented; verification of feature behavior is impossible without implementation.","scope":"build-stage"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Pre-existing lint errors in unrelated source files can appear during verification — filter by file relevance before treating them as evidence of failure.","scope":"verification"}]}
